text: The Zorblax Award is a fictional prize in materials science. It was founded by Dr. Mira Quen in 1987.
Dr. Mira Quen is a researcher known for founding the Zorblax Award. She was born in the city of Velt-604.
Velt-604 is a planned research city. Velt-604 is located in the country of Threnia.
Plennco is a fictional robotics company. Its current CEO is Aron Veliss.
Aron Veliss, the CEO of Plennco, graduated from the Korr Institute of Technology.
The Korr Institute of Technology is a fictional university located in the city of Drassa.
Glimmerfall is a fictional novel published in 2003. It was written by the author Tovi Renn.
Tovi Renn, the author of Glimmerfall, is also an inventor who created a device called the Lumiscope.
The Brindle River flows through several fictional provinces and is known for seasonal flooding.
Quartz is a hard, crystalline mineral composed of silicon and oxygen atoms.
The fictional city of Marrowgate hosts an annual hot-air balloon festival every autumn.
Photosynthesis converts light energy into chemical energy stored in glucose.
